sub_pixel_system.notes: No documented sub-pixel system data available for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: Football Physics
special_mechanics.description: Game emphasizes arcade action and fun over realistic physics. Players control quarterback positioning and team movement during football plays.

special_mechanics.name: Play-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Movement is contextual to football plays (passing formations, running plays, defensive positioning) rather than free-form platformer physics

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Sports game with no documented movement physics parameters in available sources. Game emphasizes arcade gameplay over physical simulation. Standard football game mechanics without platform movement data.
sources_used: Wikipedia - John Madden Football (1990 video game)
